reliability.tuvNote: Excellent. What Car? #1 reliability 2024. 1.6 TDI manual is benchmark.

engines.name: 1.2 TSI 86hp / 110hp (CJZA)

cons: Chain watch on early units mandatory
Not for high-mileage use without inspection

engines.name: 1.4 TSI 150hp (CZDA)

ACT cylinder deactivation can cause vibration

engines.name: 1.8 TSI 180hp

engines.name: 1.6 TDI 105hp / 110hp
faults: DPF fouling on city-only use — need occasional motorway drive

engines.name: 2.0 TDI 150hp / 184hp

DPF and EGR at high mileage

transmissions.name: 7-speed DSG DQ200 (petrol)
transmissions.specialistNote: DQ200 dry dual-clutch: avoid heavy stop-go city use. Jerking/hesitation at low speed is normal. Oil service every 60,000 km mandatory. Mechatronics failure is main repair (€800–1,500).

transmissions.name: 6-speed DSG DQ250 (2.0 TDI)
transmissions.specialistNote: DQ250 wet dual-clutch: used on higher-torque 2.0 TDI engines. Oil-bath clutch is robust. Service every 60,000 km.

note: Best value family hatchback in Slovakia. What Car? #1 reliability 2024. 1.6 TDI manual is one of the best used cars available.
summary: Excellent reliability especially 1.6 TDI manual. Mk3 What Car? Reliability Award 2024. Key risk: 1.2 TSI chain and DSG service history.
buyingTip: 1.6 TDI manual with full service history is the benchmark used car. Check DSG service stamps on auto. 1.2 TSI: only buy with cold start test passed.

reliability.tuvNote: Excellent. Same as hatchback but 610L boot. Best family estate value.

engines.name: 2.0 TDI 150hp 4x4
faults: Same as 2WD plus Haldex coupling — service every 60,000 km
Haldex pump failure if oil not changed

transmissions.name: 6-speed DSG DQ250
transmissions.specialistNote: DQ250 wet dual-clutch: used on higher-torque 2.0 TDI engines. Oil-bath clutch is robust. Service every 60,000 km.

transmissions.name: 7-speed DSG DQ200 (petrol)

note: Best value family estate. 610L boot. 2.0 TDI 4x4 one of best all-round used cars in Slovakia.

buyingTip: 2.0 TDI 150hp manual or DSG estate is the perfect all-rounder. Check tailgate for water. DSG stamps essential.

summary: Good reliability but below the exceptional Mk3 standard. Main concern: PHEV complexity and early DSG issues on 2020 build.

engines.name: 2.0i N46 143hp / 170hp
faults: VANOS solenoid failure — clatter on startup
Timing chain on N46 at high mileage

engines.name: 2.5i / 3.0i N52 218hp
faults: Electric water pump failure at 80,000 km — preventive replacement
pros: Smooth inline-6 — engine of the year
cons: Electric water pump must be replaced preventively

engines.name: 330i E90 258hp N52
faults: Same N52 issues — water pump, VANOS, coolant

engines.name: 2.0d N47 136hp / 163hp / 177hp
faults: CRITICAL: N47 timing chain on REAR of engine — failure at 100,000–150,000 km
Catastrophic engine damage when chain breaks
Timing chain rattle on cold start = imminent failure
cons: N47 chain is one of worst diesel faults in EU market
MUST check cold start for rattle
Expensive fix if not caught early

transmissions.name: 6-speed manual
faults: BMW clutch more expensive than average

transmissions.name: 6-speed ZF automatic
faults: Service oil at 80,000 km — not sealed-for-life despite BMW claim
transmissions.specialistNote: ZF 6HP. Generally good but needs oil service every 80,000 km. BMW claims 'lifetime fill' — do not believe this.

note: Budget prestige. High repair costs when things go wrong. 320d M Sport manual is the iconic spec.
summary: Average reliability — BMW complexity shows at age. Key issues: electric water pump, VANOS, N47 diesel chain.
buyingTip: 320d M Sport manual is iconic but know what you buy. N47 diesel chain is critical. Water pump preventive replacement. Full BMW service history essential.

reliability.tuvNote: Good — significantly better than E90. ZF 8-speed auto excellent.

note: Sweet spot BMW. 320d xDrive touring 2016+ is the benchmark. ZF 8-speed auto excellent.
summary: Good reliability — significantly better than E90. Main watch: N47 diesel chain pre-2015, B47 much better.
buyingTip: B47 diesel (2015+) is the right engine. ZF 8-speed auto is a joy. Full BMW service history. xDrive for Slovak winter.

note: Latest generation. Very good reliability rating. M340i is exceptional performance saloon. 2022+ preferred.

note: LAST IN CLASS: What Car? 2023 put W205 last in executive car class for reliability.

transmissions.name: 7-speed S tronic
faults: SERVICE AT 40,000 KM IS MANDATORY — NOT 60k
Using wrong fluid interval causes failure
Clutch pack wear if interval missed
transmissions.specialistNote: Audi S tronic: unlike VW DSG, the Audi S tronic requires service every 40,000 km (not 60k). This is the most commonly missed item. Using wrong fluid or missing interval leads to clutch pack failure (€1,500–3,000).

note: Better reliability than C-Class W205. 2.0 TDI 190hp quattro S tronic is the business fleet spec.
summary: Good reliability for premium class. S tronic service at 40k mandatory. Fuel pump recall on 2020–2021.
buyingTip: Check 2020–2021 fuel pump recall VIN. S tronic 40k service stamps. Quattro for winter. 2.0 TDI 190hp S tronic Avant quattro: definitive spec.

reliability.tuvNote: Good. Same SPA platform as XC60. 97% NCAP. Best premium estate for families.

features: Full ADAS standard on all V60

reliability.tuvNote: Excellent. TUV Report: Lexus IS ranked #1 most reliable used car multiple years.

faults: NiMH battery very rarely fails — check health at Lexus
cons: e-CVT sound normal — not a fault

transmissions.name: e-CVT (300h hybrid)
transmissions.specialistNote: Toyota e-CVT uses a planetary gearset — no belt, no pulleys, no wear items. Engine drone under acceleration is petrol charging the battery — completely normal. Near-zero transmission failures across all Toyota hybrids.

note: TUV Report: Lexus IS ranked #1 most reliable used car in 3-5yr and 6-7yr categories. Japanese luxury at European luxury prices.
summary: Excellent reliability. TUV #1 most reliable in class multiple years. IS 300h hybrid most popular.
buyingTip: IS 300h hybrid: request free Lexus HV battery health check. Worth premium over W205 C-Class for reliability.
